creator: swear@aa.net
text:
The "Bugs" section ("Vidcontrol and kbdcontrol work only on a (virtual)
console and not with X11.") seems to be for the wrong commands.
================

Fix: 

Probably just change "control" to "map" twice.  I don't know, but the
rest of the comment seems likely to be OK.
How-To-Repeat: n/a
================
